title: Compliment Someone
description: Say something genuinely nice about another player right now. They gain 1 point if they believe you.

args.note: Say something genuinely nice about the chosen player. The point stands only if they believe you.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.note('Say something genuinely nice about the chosen player. The point stands only if they believe you.')
    state.add_points(chosen, 1)

title: Mandatory Dance Break
description: All players must stand up and dance for 10 seconds. No exceptions. The most enthusiastic dancer gains 2 points (voted by majority).

args.note: All players stand up and dance for 10 seconds. A majority vote picks the most enthusiastic dancer; choose them as the target.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.note('All players stand up and dance for 10 seconds. A majority vote picks the most enthusiastic dancer.')
    state.add_points(chosen, 2)

title: Speak Only in Questions
description: Stay in play until the start of your next turn. You may only communicate in the form of questions. Violations cost 2 points.

args.note: Until the start of your next turn you may only communicate in questions. Each violation costs 2 points (table-adjudicated).

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.set_condition('self', 'speak_only_in_questions', True)
    state.register_hook('on_turn_start', scope='player', code="def apply(state, ctx):\n    state.set_condition('self', 'speak_only_in_questions', False)\n    state.note('The questions-only restriction has ended.')\n")
    state.note('Until the start of your next turn you may only communicate in questions. Each violation costs 2 points.')

title: Left Hand Only
description: For the rest of this round you may only use your left hand for everything. Lefties use their right hand.

args.note: For the rest of this round you may only use your left hand for everything (lefties: right hand). Table-adjudicated.

title: This Card Is Actually Cursed
description: Announce 'I am cursed.' You are cursed. What that means is up for debate.

args.note: Announce 'I am cursed.' You are cursed. What that means is up for debate.

title: Invisible Card
description: Pretend to play an invisible card. Mime its effects. Other players must react as if it was real.

args.note: Mime playing an invisible card and act out its effects. All other players must react as if it were real.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.note('Mime playing an invisible card and act out its effects. All other players must react as if it were real.')

title: Point at the Ceiling
description: Whoever looks up loses 1 point. If no one looks up, the player who played this card loses 1 point.

args.note: Point at the ceiling. Choose the first player who looked up as the target; if nobody looked, choose yourself.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.note('Point at the ceiling. The chosen player is whoever looked up, or the player of this card if nobody did.')
    state.subtract_points(chosen, 1)

title: The Meta Card
description: This card is about itself. By reading it, you have already played it. Nothing else happens.

args.note: This card is about itself. By reading it, you have already played it. Nothing else happens.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.note('This card is about itself. By reading it, you have already played it. Nothing else happens.')

title: High Five Tax
description: Anyone who gives a high five for the rest of the game must pay 1 point to the other person.

args.note: For the rest of the game, anyone who gives a high five pays 1 point to the other person (table-adjudicated).

title: Rename a Player
description: Give any player a nickname. They must be addressed by that name for the rest of the game. Refusing costs 3 points.

args.note: Give the chosen player a nickname. They must be addressed by it for the rest of the game; refusing costs 3 points (table-adjudicated).

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.set_condition(chosen, 'nicknamed', True)
    state.note('Give the chosen player a nickname. They must be addressed by it for the rest of the game; refusing costs 3 points.')

title: The Prophecy
description: Announce who you think will win the game right now. If you're correct, gain 5 points at game end.

args.note: Announce who you think will win the game right now. If you are correct, you gain 5 points at game end.

title: Time Warp
description: Undo the last card played as if it never happened. The card goes back into the hand it came from.

args.note: The last card played never happened; the table unwinds its effects. Choose that card and the player whose hand it came from.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.note('The last card played never happened; the table unwinds its effects.')
    state.transfer_card('chosen_card', chosen)

title: Pay to Win
description: You may spend any number of points to gain an equal number of points. This does nothing but you feel good about it.

args.note: Spend any number of points to gain an equal number of points. Net change: zero. You feel good about it anyway.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.note('Spend any number of points to gain an equal number of points. Net change: zero. You feel good about it anyway.')

title: Dramatic Reading
description: Read the last card played aloud in your most dramatic voice. Other players rate you out of 10. You gain points equal to the average.

args.note: Read the last card played aloud in your most dramatic voice. Players rate it 0-10; the table adjusts this award to the actual average (5 is the recorded default).

title: Conspiracy Theory
description: Accuse another player of cheating. Whether or not it's true, they must defend themselves. The group votes. If guilty, they lose 3 points.

args.note: Accuse the chosen player of cheating. They must defend themselves and the group votes. If acquitted, the table restores these 3 points.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.note('Accuse the chosen player of cheating. They defend themselves and the group votes; if acquitted, the table restores the 3 points.')
    state.subtract_points(chosen, 3)

title: Borrow a Card
description: Look at another player's hand. Take one card. You must play it immediately, for better or worse.

args.note: Look at another player's hand and take one card. You must play it immediately, for better or worse.

title: The Wild Card
description: You decide what this card does. Announce its effect out loud before playing it. It does exactly what you say.

args.note: Announce this card's effect out loud before playing it. It does exactly what you said. The table holds you to it.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.note("Announce this card's effect out loud before playing it. It does exactly what you said. The table holds you to it.")

title: Rock Paper Scissors Duel
description: Challenge any player to best-of-three rock paper scissors. Winner gains 4 points.

args.note: Challenge any player to best-of-three rock paper scissors. Choose the winner of the duel as the target.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.note('Challenge any player to best-of-three rock paper scissors. The chosen player is the winner of the duel.')
    state.add_points(chosen, 4)

title: The Referendum
description: Propose any rule change. All players vote. If it passes (majority), it becomes a house rule for the rest of the game.

args.note: A proposed rule passed by majority vote — it is now a house rule for the rest of the game.

title: Tourist Mode
description: For your next two turns, you must ask what everything means and how the game works, as if you've never played before.

args.note: For your next two turns, ask what everything means and how the game works, as if you have never played before. Then remove this card.

title: Free Real Estate
description: Claim any card currently on the table in front of another player. It is yours now. No take-backs.

args.note: Claim any card currently on the table in front of another player. It is yours now. No take-backs.

title: The Pacifist
description: No one may lose points this round. Protective aura. Very good vibes only.

args.note: No one may lose points this round. Protective aura. Very good vibes only (table-adjudicated).

title: Choose Your Destiny
description: Draw 3 cards. Keep 1. Discard the others. You live with your choices.

args.note: Keep 1 of the 3 drawn cards and discard the other 2. You live with your choices.

title: Groundhog Day
description: The last player's turn repeats exactly. Same cards, same effects. Don't think too hard about it.

args.note: The previous player's turn repeats: they replay the same cards and effects as closely as the table can manage.

title: Emotional Support Card
description: Give this card to whoever looks like they're having the least fun. They gain 3 points.

args.note: Give this card to whoever looks like they are having the least fun. It stays in front of them as emotional support.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.add_points(chosen, 3)
    state.note('Give this card to whoever looks like they are having the least fun. It stays in front of them as emotional support.')

title: Forbidden Word
description: Pick a common word. No one may say it for the rest of the game. Anyone who does loses 2 points. You decide the word.

args.note: Pick a common word and announce it. For the rest of the game anyone who says it loses 2 points (table-adjudicated).

title: The Floor Vote
description: All players simultaneously point at whoever they think deserves 3 points. The player with the most votes gets 3 points.

args.note: All players simultaneously point at whoever they think deserves 3 points. Choose the player with the most votes as the target.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.note('All players simultaneously point at whoever they think deserves 3 points. The chosen player is whoever got the most votes.')
    state.add_points(chosen, 3)

title: Chaos Shuffle
description: All players pass their hands to the player on their left simultaneously.

args.note: All players pass their entire hands to the player on their left simultaneously.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.note('All players pass their entire hands to the player on their left simultaneously.')

title: Two Truths and a Lie (Card Edition)
description: State two true things about a card in your hand and one lie. Other players guess the lie. Each correct guesser gets 1 point.

args.note: State two true things and one lie about a card in your hand; the others guess the lie. Wrong guessers give their point back (table-adjudicated).

title: The Clone
description: Copy the effect of any card that has already been played this game. If you can remember it.

args.note: Copy the effect of any card that has already been played this game — if you can remember it. The table re-applies that effect.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.note('Copy the effect of any card that has already been played this game, if you can remember it. The table re-applies that effect.')

title: Timeout
description: The game pauses for 2 minutes. Players may discuss strategy, complain, or simply sit in silence.

args.note: The game pauses for 2 minutes. Players may discuss strategy, complain, or simply sit in silence.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.note('The game pauses for 2 minutes. Players may discuss strategy, complain, or simply sit in silence.')

title: The Bystander
description: Skip your turn but gain 2 points for not participating. Sometimes doing nothing is the move.

title: Hot Potato
description: Pass this card to another player at any time, even out of turn, to give them a problem you don't want. They must play it on their next turn.

args.note: The chosen player must play this card on their next turn. It may be passed again at any time, even out of turn.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.transfer_card('this', chosen)
    state.note('The chosen player must play this card on their next turn. It may be passed again at any time, even out of turn.')

title: Unreliable Narrator
description: Describe the last card that was played — but get one detail wrong. If no one notices, you gain 2 points. If someone does, they gain 2 points.

args.note: Describe the last card played but get one detail wrong. If nobody notices, choose yourself as the target; if someone catches it, choose them.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    chosen = "id:" + (ctx.get("chosen_player_id") or "")
    state.note('Describe the last card played but get one detail wrong. The 2 points go to you if nobody notices, or to whoever catches the error.')
    state.add_points(chosen, 2)

title: Legacy Card
description: Write your name on this card. It is now named after you. If it is ever played again, you gain 1 point.

args.note: Write your name on this card. It is now named after you; whenever it is played again, you gain 1 point.

title: The Hype Card
description: Announce the next card you play as if it's the most amazing thing anyone has ever done. If the table agrees, gain 3 points.

args.note: Announce your next play as the most amazing thing anyone has ever done. The 3-point award stands only if the table agrees.

title: Nap Time
description: Close your eyes for 30 seconds. You are resting. Nothing can target you during this time. Probably.

args.note: Close your eyes for 30 seconds. Nothing can target you while napping. Probably. Afterwards, remove this card and the condition.

title: The Historian
description: Recite from memory every card that has been played this game. Gain 1 point per card you correctly name.

args.note: Recite from memory every card that has been played this game. The table adjusts this award to 1 point per correctly named card (3 is the recorded default).

title: Mystery Box
description: Shuffle your hand face-down. Draw one card at random and play it immediately without looking at it first.

args.note: Draw one card at random and play it immediately, without looking first.

title: The Epilogue
description: Keep this card. If you are still holding it when the game ends, you gain a decisive 100-point bonus — enough to steal the win.

canonical.sandbox:
def apply(state, ctx):
    state.register_hook('on_game_end', scope='player', code="def apply(state, ctx):\n    state.add_points('self', 100)\n")
